SEARCH
Module storm.core
Package st.orm.core.template

Enum Class SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy>
st.orm.core.template.SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy>, Constable
Enclosing interface:
SqlDialect
public static enum SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy extends Enum<SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy>
Strategy for discovering primary keys, unique keys, and foreign keys in the database schema.

The default INFORMATION_SCHEMA strategy executes a small number of bulk SQL queries against standard INFORMATION_SCHEMA views, regardless of the number of tables in the schema. This is significantly faster than the per-table JDBC_METADATA fallback when the database is accessed over a high-latency connection.

Since:
1.9

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    ALL_CONSTRAINTS
    Bulk queries using ALL_CONSTRAINTS and ALL_CONS_COLUMNS dictionary views.
    INFORMATION_SCHEMA
    Bulk queries using standard INFORMATION_SCHEMA views (TABLE_CONSTRAINTS, KEY_COLUMN_USAGE, REFERENTIAL_CONSTRAINTS).
    INFORMATION_SCHEMA_REFERENCING
    Bulk queries using INFORMATION_SCHEMA views with REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME and REFERENCED_COLUMN_NAME columns in KEY_COLUMN_USAGE for foreign key discovery.
    JDBC_METADATA
    Per-table JDBC DatabaseMetaData calls.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • JDBC_METADATA

      public static final SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy JDBC_METADATA
      Per-table JDBC DatabaseMetaData calls. Safe, portable fallback that works with any JDBC driver but issues three metadata queries per table in the schema.

    • INFORMATION_SCHEMA

      public static final SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy INFORMATION_SCHEMA
      Bulk queries using standard INFORMATION_SCHEMA views (TABLE_CONSTRAINTS, KEY_COLUMN_USAGE, REFERENTIAL_CONSTRAINTS). Requires the driver to expose POSITION_IN_UNIQUE_CONSTRAINT in KEY_COLUMN_USAGE for foreign key discovery.

    • INFORMATION_SCHEMA_REFERENCING

      public static final SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy INFORMATION_SCHEMA_REFERENCING
      Bulk queries using INFORMATION_SCHEMA views with REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME and REFERENCED_COLUMN_NAME columns in KEY_COLUMN_USAGE for foreign key discovery.

    • ALL_CONSTRAINTS

      public static final SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy ALL_CONSTRAINTS
      Bulk queries using ALL_CONSTRAINTS and ALL_CONS_COLUMNS dictionary views.

    • values

      public static SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    • valueOf

      public static SqlDialect.ConstraintDiscoveryStrategy valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
